title: Apache Security Advisories - 2021-12-09
description:
Merged 2 apache security advisories published on 2021-12-09. Original advisory IDs: CVE-2021-4104, CVE-2021-44228

Titles:
- Apache Kafka: Flaw in Apache Log4j logging library in versions 1.x
- Apache Kafka: Flaw in Apache Log4j logging library in versions from 2.0.0 and before 2.15.0
fixed_versions: In the absence of a new log4j 1.x release

one can remove JMSAppender from the log4j-1.2.17.jar artifact. Commands are listed in the pagehttp://slf4j.org/log4shell.html.We also recommend that configuration files be protected against write access as stated inhttp://slf4j.org/log4shell.html.

cves.title: Flaw in Apache Log4j logging library in versions 1.x
Flaw in Apache Log4j logging library in versions from 2.0.0 and before 2.15.0
